blended.narrative: Wolf Creek is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,104 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
